results.matched_effect_cluster: AsFT Narrow Safety Basin Alignment Direction
results.justification: EXACT TWIN — Penalises orthogonal-to-alignment-direction updates within narrow safety basin IS the chokepoint-angle bounded safety basin + alignment-direction constraint mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — Orthogonal gradient projection for safety alignment with constrained update direction IS the angular-cone gated update mechanism.
Multi-dimensional safety directions + dominant refusal direction + multiple smaller distinct directions covers angular-cone alignment-direction structure.
EXACT TWIN — Flat-loss robust-alignment basin radius maximization IS the safety basin radius mechanism.
Regularization constraining updates to important weights covers safety basin preservation mechanism.
MoE safety routing alignment via KL-divergence regularization on routing decisions IS the per-cluster (per-expert) cohesion regularization mechanism.
Adaptive regularization responding to safety risk covers angular-cone-gated update admission mechanism.
Group-shared continual learning with gradient-aware constraints IS the community-cohesion per-cluster regularization mechanism.
